Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Motion For Leave To Intervene In Pending Case, Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Marc Seidenfeld In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marc Seidenfeld for The Pearlie English Trust. Matthew Mraule for Betty Robinson. Ciarin O'Sullivan for and with James Cannon.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. The Motion for Leave to Intervene in Pending Case is denied.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instruction
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ciarin O'Sullivan for and with James Cannon. Marc Siedenfeld for and with James Bullock (Trustee of the Peralie English Trust). Matthew Mraule for Betty Robinson (Trustee).

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that he is in favor of mediation. Mr. Seidenfeld and Mr. Mraule asked that the matter be set for trial. Mr. O'Sullivan stated that Mr. Cannon is not a Party in the partition action, that his interest in the property can be partitioned, but not partitioned for sale. The Petition for Instructions was referred to the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) for trial setting (order for the same signed in open Court). Status on discovery was set for December 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The injunction to not sell the property is extended to December 2, 2013.

Judge: Anne Bouliane. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instruction
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Continued To Sep-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
